channel.title: Comments on: Smuttynose Maibock, Ep. 91
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Edmond Medina
item.dc:creator: Edmond Medina
item.description: Though Maibock is pretty darn tasty, I absolutely love their Wheat Wine which is also part of their Big Beer Series.
item.content:encoded: Though Maibock is pretty darn tasty, I absolutely love their Wheat Wine which is also part of their Big Beer Series.
